"CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-295", "name": "Improper Certificate Validation"}], "description": "### Summary
A vulnerability in vehicle authentication allows  threat actor with valid client credentials (i.e., a private key and certificate from a rooted infotainment system) to impersonate arbitrary VINs when authenticating to the telemetry server.

### Impact
The attacker would be able to submit falsified telemetry records for arbitrary VINs.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-prxj-3gcv-cqrh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-01T23:01:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-prxj-3gcv-cqrh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-prxj-3gcv-cqrh"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-01T23:01:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/teslamotors/fleet-telemetry/security/advisories/GHSA-prxj-3gcv-cqrh", "https://github.com/teslamotors/fleet-telemetry/commit/d5ca0dab55812029fd38eb77f079f74ce4f47286", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-prxj-3gcv-cqrh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/teslamotors/fleet-telemetry/security-advisories/GHSA-prxj-3gcv-cqrh", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/teslamotors/fleet-telemetry", "summary": "Tesla Fleet Telemetry allows spoofing telemetry for arbitrary vehicles via compromised vehicle credentials", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-04T16:59:38Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-prxj-3gcv-cqrh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.9.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/teslamotors/fleet-telemetry"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Tesla Fleet Telemetry allows spoofing telemetry for arbitrary vehicles via compromised vehicle credentials
